introduction-text:
Farmland Nutrient Management
"It ain't much, but it's honest work." - Dave Brandt

Farmland can be permanently upgraded in place via application of sufficient fertilizer and biochar, all the way from barren, through low, medium, and high, and finally to Terra Preta.

Step One:
Add any combination of fertilizers to add at least 148 N, 90 P, and 30 K.
compostbonemeal

Step Two:
Add two powdered charcoal to the fertilized farmland.
powder-charcoal

Step Three:
Wait! The farmland will now regenerate nutrients at the normal rate up to its new limits.
high-p: Phosphorus too high. Wait for levels to decrease.
low-n: Not enough nitrates. Add fertilizers high in N.
low-p: Not enough phosphorus. Add fertilizers high in P.
low-k: Not enough potassium. Add fertilizers high in K.
game:itemdesc-powder-charcoal: Great for nutrient retention. Use on sufficiently fertilized farmland to permanently increase tier.
itemdesc-biochar: Great for nutrient retention. Use on sufficiently fertilized farmland to permanently increase tier.
